required_params.name: variable
required_params.description: Column to get the value from

required_params.name: n
required_params.description: Index of the value to retrieve (0-based)

optional_params.name: ascending
optional_params.description: Whether to sort in ascending order (default: True)

optional_params.name: dropna
optional_params.description: Whether to drop NaN values before finding the nth value (default: False)

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output metric, defaults to 'nth_{n}_{variable}_by_{sort_by}' (optional)

outputs.description: Function that retrieves the nth value from a MetricsPipe.

Nth.description:
Get the nth value of a column after sorting by another column

Parameters:
-----------
variable : str
    Column to get the value from
n : int
    Index of the value to retrieve (0-based)
sort_by : str
    Column to sort by
ascending : bool, default=True
    Whether to sort in ascending order
dropna : bool, default=False
    Whether to drop NaN values before finding the nth value
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output metric, defaults to 'nth_{n}_{variable}_by_{sort_by}'

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that retrieves the nth value from a MetricsPipe

optional_params.name: columns
optional_params.description: Column(s) to use as columns (optional)

optional_params.name: values
optional_params.description: Column(s) to aggregate (optional)

optional_params.name: aggfunc
optional_params.description: Aggregation function to use ('mean', 'sum', 'count', etc.) (default: 'mean')

optional_params.name: fill_value
optional_params.description: Value to replace missing values with (optional)

optional_params.name: output_name
optional_params.description: Name for the output pivot table (optional)

outputs.description: Function that creates a pivot table from a MetricsPipe.

PivotTable.description:
Create a pivot table from the data

Parameters:
-----------
index : str or List[str]
    Column(s) to use as index
columns : str or List[str], optional
    Column(s) to use as columns
values : str or List[str], optional
    Column(s) to aggregate
aggfunc : str or Dict, default='mean'
    Aggregation function to use ('mean', 'sum', 'count', etc.)
fill_value : Any, optional
    Value to replace missing values with
output_name : str, optional
    Name for the output pivot table

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that creates a pivot table from a MetricsPipe

required_params.name: variable
required_params.description: Column to calculate rolling metric for

optional_params.name: function
optional_params.description: Function to apply to the rolling window ('mean', 'sum', 'std', etc.) (default: 'mean')

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations required (optional)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Whether to set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: output_column
optional_params.description: Name for the output column (optional)

outputs.description: Function that calculates rolling metric from a MetricsPipe.

RollingMetric.description:
Calculate a rolling metric on a column

Parameters:
-----------
variable : str
    Column to calculate rolling metric for
window : int
    Size of the rolling window
function : str, default='mean'
    Function to apply to the rolling window ('mean', 'sum', 'std', etc.)
min_periods : int, optional
    Minimum number of observations required
center : bool, default=False
    Whether to set the labels at the center of the window
output_column : str, optional
    Name for the output column

Returns:
--------
Callable
    Function that calculates rolling metric from a MetricsPipe
